title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.318 - Counseling for minor children ordered, when, costs
text:
452.318.  Counseling for minor children ordered, when, costs. — In any action for dissolution of marriage involving minor children, the court may order counseling for such children.  The court may assess and apportion the costs of child counseling between the parties.
(L. 1999 S.B. 329 § 1)
